name: Invictus Energy Limited
summary: Invictus Energy Limited, an independent oil and gas exploration company, focuses on the energy resources in sub-Saharan Africa. It holds an 80% interest in the SG 4571 Permit within Cabora Bassa project that covers an area of 250,000 acres located in the Cabora Bassa Basin in northern Zimbabwe. The company was formerly known as Interpose Holdings Limited and changed its name to Invictus Energy Limited in June 2018. Invictus Energy Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
